scope.target: LANG-001 refreshed candidate inventory, bounded remediation, and hybrid semantic parity evidence
constraints: Structural parity is not semantic proof
non_goals: Use one model pass as oracle

steps: Run context-translator or human semantic checklist
execution.last_completed_step: Reconciled the stale 21-item planning count, fixed four active defects, added 10 fail-closed language/parity fixtures, passed the 24-check Windows quick gate, and retained two concurring semantic reviews at subject commit 2db0636.
execution.next_action: Activate V050-005 to consume the completed foundation validators in semantic governance enforcement and dedicated PR CI.

results.summary: The current standards/specs inventory has zero untriaged language violations; four bounded defects are fixed, deterministic root parity fails closed, and both approved bilingual pairs passed retained semantic review.
results.residual_risk: Semantic review is bounded to the two root bilingual pairs and pinned subject; future material edits require a new retained review.
